title: TFCivilization Atlases
description: This is a version of "TFC Atlases" that considers the balancing of "Firma:Civilization" regarding the tools needed to read ones coordinates.
body:
This a version of "TFC Atlases" that considers the blancing of "Firma:Civilization" regarding the tools needed by the player to see their coordinates. If you are using Firma:Civilization and Map Atlases use this mod **_instead_** of
TFC Atlases not both of my mods together.

Here is the recipe since JEI doesnt show it, its shapeless.







![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/660c0de899e0066a9644c4bfa195ceefa1d1fc73.png)
